description: Negative fixture cases for the cohort scoreboards gate. Each case is a complete packet that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; ci/check_cohort_scoreboards.py loads it and asserts validation rejects it with the expected check id.

cases.summary: A signed-off row rides a scoreboard packet whose freshness-SLO state is breached.
A narrowing row renders a Stable effective label instead of dropping below the cutline.
A row records a claim label wider than the stable claim manifest publishes for its backing claim.
